title: Gravel into netherack
description: A resource pack that changes the gravel texture to netherrack to optimize netherite mining in lava.
body:
**⚠️ These pictures were taken with a mod that removes lava fog!** You’ll need to remove the lava fog in order to properly use this resource pack.

There are also resource packs to: - Have the most optimize Netherite Lava mining Setup → [Netherite & Ancient Debris Lava mining Full Setup](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/full-netherite-lava-mining-setup) - Make everything look like Netherrack except Netherite → [Netherite Lava Mining](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/netherite-lava-mining) - Make only Netherite appear blue → [Full Blue Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/full-blue-netherite) - Hide only Nether Ores → [Nether Ores into Netherrack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nether-ores-into-netherrack) Check my profile for tons of packs like these!

**Got an issue or a question? → Send me a message on Discord: enigmusse** By the way, I'm also on the Modrinth and CurseForge Discord servers.

**How to use it?** 1. Copy it into the resource packs folder of your Minecraft instance. 2. Open the escape menu, click **Resource Packs**, and select **"Gravel into Netherrack”** !

**Important:** As mentioned above, you need to remove the lava fog. Here are a few mods that can help : - Clear Water → https://modrinth.com/mod/clear-water - See Through Water/Lava → https://modrinth.com/mod/see-through-waterlava **⚠️ Don’t forget to configure the mod settings so you can actually see through lava!**

**Compatibility Notice** The resource pack functions correctly despite the compatibility warning. Simply confirm by selecting **Yes** when prompted. To suppress this notification completely, install the mod: - [No Resource Pack Warnings (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) Without this solution, I'd need to create and upload a separate archive for nearly every minor Minecraft version — even though the textures remain unchanged — leading to unnecessary extra work.
